# sr — Release-state reconciler

> Declarative change + release management. VCS + registries are the actual state; sr.yaml + conventional commits describe the desired state; sr computes the diff and applies. Three verbs: `sr plan` (preview), `sr prepare` (write version files + changelog), `sr release` (commit + tag + push + GitHub release + upload + publish). Typed publishers for cargo / npm / docker / pypi / go with registry-aware state checks; `publish: custom` as the escape hatch. One global version per monorepo, shared across every package. No user shell hooks — builds live in CI between `sr prepare` and `sr release`.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/README.md): Installation, three-verb workflow, configuration reference, publishers
- [examples/](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/tree/main/examples): Complete `sr.yaml` per ecosystem (cargo, npm, pnpm, uv, docker, multi-language, custom)
- [examples/ci/](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/tree/main/examples/ci): GitHub Actions workflows showing single-job and multi-platform matrix shapes
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## Key modules

- [crates/core/src/release.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/release.rs): `plan()`, `prepare()`, `execute()` — the three verbs
- [crates/core/src/diff.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/diff.rs): Terraform-style resource diff for `sr plan`
- [crates/core/src/config.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/config.rs): YAML schema — `git`, `commit`, `changelog`, `channels`, `vcs`, `packages`
- [crates/core/src/publishers/](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/tree/main/crates/core/src/publishers): Typed publishers (cargo, npm, docker, pypi, go, custom)
- [crates/core/src/workspaces.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/workspaces.rs): Cargo / npm / pnpm / uv workspace member discovery
- [crates/core/src/stages/](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/tree/main/crates/core/src/stages): Reconciler pipeline — each stage is idempotent
- [crates/core/src/commit.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/commit.rs): Conventional-commit parsing
- [crates/core/src/changelog.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/changelog.rs): Per-package changelog sections with minijinja templates
- [crates/core/src/version_files.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/core/src/version_files.rs): Multi-language manifest bumping
- [crates/cli/src/main.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/crates/cli/src/main.rs): CLI entry point

## Action

- [action.yml](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/action.yml): `mode: plan|prepare|release` input, normalized JSON outputs (`version`, `tag`, `bump`, `floating_tag`, `commit_count`)

## Skill

- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/sr/blob/main/skills/sr/SKILL.md): Agent Skill for planning + executing releases with sr
